source: Ferrara, Lastilla, Ravanelli, Valério (2022). Modelling the Rongorongo tablets: A new transcription of the Échancrée tablet and the foundation for decipherment attempts. Digital Scholarship in the Humanities, 37(2), 497-526.

conventions.compound_ligature: dot (.) joins ligated components within one graphic element
conventions.uncertain: parentheses () mark uncertain reading of enclosed element
conventions.start_cut: ] prefix — text begins at a damaged or cut edge
conventions.end_cut: [ suffix — text ends at a damaged or cut edge
conventions.barthel_code: 3-digit Barthel (1958) code padded with leading zeros, optional allograph suffix letter(s)
